steps.title: Find the sample rate
steps.content: Of the $400$ customers surveyed, $7$ were interested. Use that sample fraction to estimate the same fraction of all $48{,}000$ customers.

steps.title: Scale to the population
steps.content: Multiply the total number of customers by the sample fraction: $$ 48{,}000(\frac{7}{400}) $$ $$ 120\cdot 7=840 $$ The answer is C.
